key_changes: Wrapped TokenRefreshOverlay with AppLifecycleSyncManager to enable lifecycle monitoring
Maintained existing app structure while adding foreground sync capability

lib/app/app_lifecycle_sync_manager.dart.purpose: New widget to handle app lifecycle and foreground sync triggering
key_features: Uses 30-second debounce interval to prevent excessive syncs
Proper state management with Riverpod providers

changes: Added detailed implementation notes with acceptance criteria validation

patterns_discovered: Widget-based approach for lifecycle management using ConsumerStatefulWidget
Integration pattern using wrapper widgets (AppLifecycleSyncManager wrapping TokenRefreshOverlay)
30-second debounce interval pattern for sync operations
Comprehensive validation chain pattern (syncEnabled + connectivity + WiFi-only + notAlreadySyncing)
Debug logging pattern with emoji prefixes (🔄, ✅, ⚠️, ❌)
Riverpod provider pattern for state management
Proper disposal pattern with WidgetsBinding observer management
gotchas_discovered: Need to handle multiple validation criteria in sequence to ensure sync only runs under proper conditions
Requires careful state management to prevent duplicate syncs
Must respect user preferences for WiFi-only mode and sync enablement
Proper cleanup of lifecycle observer in dispose() is crucial
Network connectivity checks are essential before triggering sync

approach_outcome.approach: Implemented AppLifecycleSyncManager widget with comprehensive foreground sync functionality
key_achievements: Created lifecycle monitoring widget using WidgetsBindingObserver
Implemented debouncing with configurable minimum interval
Maintained existing app architecture while adding new functionality
Provided detailed debug logging for troubleshooting

recommendations: Consider making the debounce interval configurable via user settings
Add unit tests for the AppLifecycleSyncManager widget
Consider adding offline sync queuing when network is unavailable
Document the widget in the app's architecture documentation
Consider adding user feedback (toast/snackbar) when sync is triggered
Monitor performance impact of the lifecycle observer in production
